channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: C’est le grand déstockage chez la Fnac et Darty : voici les 12 meilleures offres à saisir avant la fin des soldes
item.description: Les soldes d’été entrent dans leur dernière semaine et la Fnac comme Darty ont décidé de vider définitivement leurs stocks ! C’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires avant la fermeture des rayons promotionnels. Pour vous faire gagner du temps, nous avons sélectionné les dernières offres qui valent vraiment le coup avant la fin.

item.title: Xiaomi présente les Redmi Note 17 et 17 Pro : écran géant, batterie géante
item.description: Redmi a officialisé ses Note 17 et Note 17 Pro en Chine ce 14 juillet. Deux smartphones milieu de gamme qui misent notamment sur une batterie XXL et un prix attractif.

item.title: X admits its broken algorithm made the site feel like a ‘battleground’
item.description: X's head of product, Nikita Bier, admitted in a post on Monday that X's algorithm was "missing" data about surfacing posts from people who you've followed back. Now, he says a tweak will "boost visibility of your posts to your mutuals," hopefully enhancing the sense of community instead of highlighting and spreading random arguments, but […]

item.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
item.description: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity costs, water supplies, or local control.

item.title: WD-Black's SN8100 2TB Gen 5 SSD hits a blazing-fast 14,900MB/s read speeds — and it's down to $400
item.description: Absolutely blistering speeds for video editing, AI, and gaming.

item.title: Iran abused mobile networks’ vulnerabilities to locate U.S. military in the Middle East, report says
item.description: The Iranian government exploited well-known flaws in cellphone networks to locate and then strike U.S. military personnel in the build-up and beginning of the war.

item.title: L’Apple Watch Series 11 (42 mm) n’a jamais été aussi peu chère qu’à quelques jours de la fin des soldes
item.description: L'Apple Watch Series 11 (42 mm) profite des soldes d'été pour s'afficher à seulement 349 euros chez Boulanger. C'est l'un des prix les plus bas jamais constaté depuis sa sortie pour la dernière montre connectée ultra-complète d’Apple.

item.title: US and security allies warn Russian attacks on critical infrastructure are ramping up against 'poorly configured and vulnerable networking devices worldwide'
item.description: Russians are targeting misconfigured routers running in critical infrastructure firms.

item.title: The Dreame Z30 Pro Aqua cordless stick vac-and-mop is a versatile floor cleaning combo for both vacuuming and light mopping duties
item.description: The Dreame Z30 Pro Aqua is a top choice for anyone after an all-in-one floor cleaning solution. Just don't expect it to perform as extensively as a dedicated wet-and-dry vacuum

item.title: Le prix du giga explose chez les opérateurs, le rachat de SFR fait sauter les digues
item.description: De 0,12 à 0,29 euro le gigaoctet en quelques semaines : le forfait mobile français vit sa grande correction. Un seul opérateur n'a pas bougé ses prix, et l'ombre du rachat de SFR plane sur tout le reste.

item.title: New York Governor Signs First Statewide Data Center Moratorium
item.description: “We have no choice but to address the challenges created by these massive facilities,” New York governor Kathy Hochul said. The executive order will pause construction for one year.

item.title: I’m de-influencing you from buying the RingConn 3 (even though it’s pretty)
item.description: The RingConn 3 actually looks like real jewelry, not a wearable -- but its fitness tracking and headache detection features are disappointing.

item.title: Fin des soldes d’été : Amazon vide ses stocks et lâche ses derniers bons plans Tech
item.description: Les soldes d’été entrent dans leur toute dernière semaine, et Amazon a décidé de frapper un grand coup pour vider ses stocks. Le géant du e-commerce n’hésite pas à casser les prix sur de nombreux produits Tech. Découvrez notre sélection des ultimes offres incontournables et des remises les plus intéressantes à saisir avant la fin.

item.title: Which Ninja air fryer should I buy? Here are our personal favorites — plus top tips on how to choose
item.description: From Foodi to Crispi to Double Stack, Ninja is not short of air fryer options — here's how to figure out which model is right for you.

item.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
item.description: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

item.title: AI does not solve poor finance infrastructure: it weakens it
item.description: Without trusted data and systems, AI accelerates finance problems instead of solving them.

item.title: Autonomous AI worms mark a new era of adaptive cyberattacks
item.description: Why a university lab's AI worm should change how every security team plans.

item.title: Real Housewives of London season 2 release date confirmed as Hayu promises 'most personal season yet' — I just hope it doesn't repeat the same annoying mistake
item.description: Turns out, we're only weeks away from Real Housewives of London season 2 being released — but will Hayu make the same mistake as before?

item.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
item.description: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on open models?

item.title: Un miroir géant va être envoyé dans l’espace pour renvoyer la lumière du Soleil la nuit : à quoi ça sert ?
item.description: Le régulateur télécoms américain vient d'autoriser une startup à lancer un miroir géant en orbite pour renvoyer la lumière du Soleil sur Terre en pleine nuit. Un projet qui fascine autant qu'il inquiète.

item.title: Why is a Kodak point-and-shoot with worse picture quality than your phone the best-selling camera year after year? The answer is surprising, but also kind of obvious
item.description: Most people could guess why the Kodak PixPro FZ45 and FZ55 top multiple best-selling charts year after year, but there's also a surprising truth behind these point-and-shoot compact cameras.

item.title: Volkswagens new e-bikes pack cameras, radar, and smart glasses — heres everything you need to know
item.description: Volkswagen and N+ have launched a new smart e-bike range with car-inspired safety features, including a rear-view camera, radar blind spot alerts, connected lights, and smart accessories.

item.title: Telegram’s shortlink domain is back online after day-long suspension
item.description: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov confirmed an outage in a tweet, saying that shortlinks to the messaging app had "stopped working."

item.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
item.description: Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, audiobooks, and more.

item.title: Mini PC deals for video editing and gaming: I found the best space-saving desktop gear from GMKtec, Geekom, Minisforum, and Corsair
item.description: These are the top mini PC deals if you're creating a gaming and video editing rig, plus eGPU docks and the perfect PSU to complete your setup.

item.title: Le DJI Neo 2 est le drone de poche parfait pour l’été, et son prix chute à seulement 176 €
item.description: Le DJI Neo 2 améliore la formule de son prédécesseur avec une meilleure stabilisation et un système d'évitement d'obstacles, le tout dans un format de poche idéal pour les réseaux sociaux. Bonne nouvelle : pendant les soldes d'été, cette excellente petite caméra volante voit son prix chuter à seulement 176 euros au lieu de 229 euros à son lancement. ...

item.title: Sam Altman didn’t need another lawsuit
item.description: OpenAI has spent the better part of the year involved in lawsuit after lawsuit, including one from the world's richest man. But last Friday, the company was hit with one of the highest-profile legal actions yet - from Apple. OpenAI's expensive hardware bet is what's on the line. Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI, filed in Northern […]

item.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
item.description: Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.

item.title: Exclusive: Listen to one of Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy's 'most epic tracks' first here
item.description: Hear one of the songs from the upcoming Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy exclusively here.

item.title: This new macOS infostealer poses as an Apple crash reporting tool to try and steal all your valuable data
item.description: Researchers found a new piece of macOS malware grabbing passwords, crypto data, and more.

item.title: The Shards trailer: Ryan Murphy spins a tale of sex, murder, and the 1980s
item.description: Bret Easton Ellis's "The Shards" comes to TV in Ryan Murphy's latest, starring Homer Gere, Igby Rigney, Kaia Gerber, and more.

item.title: "It mirrors real life better than most gym exercises" A celebrity PT recommends this simple move as the best strength exercise most over 50s aren't doing
item.description: David Higgins has trained everyone from Margot Robbie and Scarlet Johansson to Richard Madden and Pedro Pascal.

item.title: T-Mobiles back-to-school deals include free iPhones, Apple Watches, and a $99 iPad — how to qualify
item.description: T-Mobile’s back-to-school deals bring free smartphones, discounted devices, and affordable connectivity options for students and families.

item.title: Netflixs The Whisper Man trailer is every parents worst nightmare
item.description: Netflix has dropped its trailer for "The Whisper Man", a crime thriller based on Alex North's novel starring Adam Scott, Robert DeNiro and Michelle Monaghan.

item.title: Trump escalates threats to free press in subpoenas to 5 New York Times reporters
item.description: Five New York Times journalists were delivered subpoenas, some of them while at home. Dangerous. Brazen. Unprecedented. Uncharted territory.Reaction in the media world has been swift and severe to the issue of subpoenas to five New York Times journalists who reported on security questions involving the new, Qatari-gifted Air Force One — a legal maneuver seen as a troubling escalation of the Trump administration’s campaign to control and intimidate independent media outlets.“The subpoenas are an extraordinary escalation in President Trump’s efforts to threaten and intimidate independent news or...

item.title: Pixel Watch 5 leak shows off four different finishes
item.description: A new leak may have just spoiled the Pixel Watch 5 and its finishes ahead of Google's launch event next month. Leaked press renders provided to The Tide Chart by OnLeaks appear to show the upcoming watch with four case finishes: black (Dark Anthracite), polished silver (Natural Silver), yellow gold (Warm Gold), and a duskier […]

item.title: VPN firms and digital rights groups join forces to urge the UK government to leave VPNs alone
item.description: A coalition of over 20 digital rights groups and tech firms, including Amnesty International, NordVPN, and Mozilla, warns that plans to age-gate or restrict VPNs will severely compromise national cybersecurity while doing little to keep children safe.

item.title: Craft cool iced coffees this summer with the Keurig K-Iced Coffee Maker, now $40 off at Amazon
item.description: As of July 14, the Keurig K-Iced Coffee Maker is discounted to $89.99 at Amazon, 31% off its list price of $129.99.

item.title: How to watch France vs. Spain online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream France vs. Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: What's the difference between active noise canceling and passive?
item.description: The frustrating science of keeping your ears from doing their job.

item.title: Waze devient « moins bavard » pour votre confort et se dope à Gemini
item.description: Waze empile les fonctions dopées à l'IA : navigation qui apprend vos habitudes, recherche vocale propulsée par Gemini et un mode pour enfin parler moins. Le tout se déploie cette semaine.
